name: package-list
title: Package Manager / List Installed
description: List all packages installed in the Unity project (UPM packages). Returns information about each installed package including name, version, source, and description. Use this to check which packages are currently installed before adding or removing packages.

parameters.name: sourceFilter
parameters.description: Filter packages by source. Values: [All, Registry, Embedded, Local, Git, BuiltIn, LocalTarball]
parameters.enum: All, Registry, Embedded, Local, Git, BuiltIn, LocalTarball

parameters.name: nameFilter
parameters.description: Filter packages by name, display name, or description (case-insensitive). Results are prioritized: exact name match, exact display name match, name substring, display name substring, description substring.

parameters.name: directDependenciesOnly
parameters.description: Include only direct dependencies (packages in manifest.json). If false, includes all resolved packages. Default: false
